title: Google Antigravity 2.0 Beginner's Guide
summary: Google has released Antigravity 2.0, a standalone desktop application designed for multi-agent teams and agent-optimized workflows. It includes scheduled tasks, native voice capabilities, and one-click integration with other Google products.
